    Methods in bupt.ta.service with parameters of type Application
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyApplicationSubmitted(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that an application was submitted.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyAutoClosed(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, String note)
    Notifies the applicant that a pending application was auto-closed (workload cap).
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyAutoPromotedFromWaitlist(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that they were promoted from the waitlist to selected.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyInterviewDetails(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant of interview time, location, and assessment notes.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyInterviewInvite(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that their application moved to the interview stage.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyRejected(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, String moNotes)
    Notifies the applicant that they were not selected.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifySelected(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that they were selected for the role.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyWaitlist(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that they are on the waitlist.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyWithdrawn(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that they withdrew an application.
    void
    ApplicationTimelineService.record(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, String actorUserId, String actorName, String actorRole, String eventType, String title, String detail, String fromStatus, String toStatus)
    Appends one timeline event for an application.
    void
    ApplicationTimelineService.recordStatusChange(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, String actorUserId, String actorName, String actorRole, String fromStatus, String toStatus, String detail)
    Records a ApplicationTimelineService.TYPE_STATUS_CHANGED timeline event.
